title: Endless Villager Discounts
description:
This simple Paper plugin makes villager healing discounts permanent.
When you cure a zombified villager, the trade discounts you get will never decay — no matter how much time passes or how many trades are made
body:
Permanent Healing Discounts

Paper 1.21+ removes vanilla villager cure discount stacking and permanence by default. This lightweight plugin restores these mechanics, allowing cure discounts to stack infinitely and never expire—even after long periods without trading.

Features:

Infinite stacking of villager cure discounts, like vanilla Minecraft.

Discounts never decay or reset, even after 20+ days of inactivity.

Discounts persist through server restarts, ensuring consistent trades.

No configuration required—drop and go. Perfect for survival servers and trading halls wanting stable villager pricing.

Compatibility:

Works on Paper 1.21+ and newer.

Not compatible with Spigot or Bukkit.
